title: INF-2 KV cache technique public API + Work Profile knob + observability
goal: Lift the per-adapter KvCacheOps into the public ModelRuntime-level KV cache technique surface per AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES.b: kernel.model_runtime.kv_set_quantization, kv_prefix_commit, kv_prefix_restore, kv_evict, kv_occupancy. Wire Work Profile knob settings.exec_policy.kv_cache + FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-KV-* events.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/techniques/kv_cache_technique.rs; Tauri commands in app/src-tauri/src/commands/kv_cache.rs; Work Profile schema extension; tests.
unblock_conditions: MT-075 LlamaCpp KV cache impl merged; Candle transformer KV cache lands implicitly via candle internals.
implementation_notes: Per AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES.b + refinement INF-2: KV caching PRODUCTION. Work Profile knob: settings.exec_policy.kv_cache: `{ quantization: KvQuantSupport, prefix_cache_ttl_seconds: u64, max_bytes: Option<u64> }` applied at session start. Tauri commands: kernel_model_runtime_kv_set_quantization, kernel_model_runtime_kv_prefix_commit, kernel_model_runtime_kv_prefix_restore, kernel_model_runtime_kv_evict_all, kernel_model_runtime_kv_occupancy. FR events: FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-KV-QUANT-CHANGE { model_id, prev, next }, FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-KV-PREFIX-COMMIT { model_id, handle_id, token_count }, FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-KV-PREFIX-RESTORE { model_id, handle_id, hit: bool }, FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-KV-EVICT { model_id, evicted_entries, reason }. Conservative defaults: quantization=q8 (lower memory; production sane); prefix_cache_ttl=300s; max_bytes=None (operator-driven). Capability gate: technique surface returns CapabilityNotSupported when supports_kv_quantization=None (e.g., SSM models) — UI hides the knob per MT-068 IPC. Replay-resistance: prefix_restore validates the handle's content_hash against the cached state's hash (already enforced in MT-063/MT-075). Tests: technique surface dispatches to LlamaCpp KvCacheOps correctly; quant change emits FR event; restore hit/miss counter increments.
risk_if_missed: INF-2 PRODUCTION partial (per-adapter only); UI knob has no backend.
validator_focus: Capability gate hides knob for SSMs; FR event field shape stable; conservative defaults documented.

minimum_controls: Capability gate hides UI when SSM (test verifies).
FR field stability (snake_case JSON contract for tooling).
